_source: DepEd Math 1, Quarter 1, Module 3 — Regrouping Sets of Ones into Sets of Tens and Sets of Tens into Hundreds Using Objects. Mirrors data/levels.json level3's question set 1:1 (same ids/choices/correctIndex) — that file stays the single source of truth for the playable Level 3 battle and its recorded demo battleScripts; this bank exists so Topic C ships as a real bundled, independently loadable question bank per BR-01/BR-05.

questions.prompt: Mary has 14 bananas. What is the equivalent in tens and ones?
questions.promptTagalog: May 14 saging si Mary. Ilan ang katumbas nito sa tens at ones?

questions.prompt: Mary bought 25 guavas. What is the equivalent?
questions.promptTagalog: Bumili si Mary ng 25 bayabas. Ano ang katumbas nito?

questions.prompt: 26 santol fruits are equivalent to how many tens and ones?
questions.promptTagalog: 26 santol ay katumbas ng ilang tens at ones?

questions.prompt: The 40 chico fruits make how many groups of ten?
questions.promptTagalog: Ang 40 chico ay may ilang pangkat ng tigsasampu?

questions.prompt: What is 125 equivalent to in hundreds, tens, and ones?
questions.promptTagalog: Ang 125 ay katumbas ng ilang hundreds, tens, at ones?
